firmware.title: Android 10 - Helpful, smart, and simple
firmware.description:
Introducing Android 10
New ways to customize your phone, control your privacy & get things done.

Your device will be updated to Android 10. Learn more at android.com/10.

New features include:
- Dark theme
- Navigate your phone with gestures
- Additional controls for privacy & location
- Quick actions & replies in notifications

Downloading updates over a mobile network or while roaming may cause additional charges.

firmware.title: Android 11: Better messaging & controls
firmware.description:
Introducing Android 11
Powerful device controls and easier ways to manage conversations and your privacy.

Your device will be updated to Android 11. Learn more at android.com/11.

New features include:
- Improved device & media controls
- Manage your conversations in one place
- Built-in screen recording
- More privacy controls

Downloading updates over a mobile network or while roaming may cause additional charges.

firmware.title: Android 11
firmware.description: This update fixes critical bugs and improves the performance and stability of your device. Additional charges may apply when updates are downloaded over the cellular network or while roaming.

firmware.title: Android 11
firmware.description: This is the final software update containing improvements and bug fixes for Pixel 2 and Pixel 2 XL devices. For more information on your device’s ongoing support go to: https://g.co/pixel/updates
